classObjective: Write absolute value expressions that model real-world distances and accuracy as positive differences.
workedExamples: 1-5, Example 1 — Write Absolute Value Expressions for Real-World Accuracy Situations
1-5, Example 2 — Evaluate Absolute Value Expressions with Integers
warmUp: Find |5| and |-3|; describe what absolute value means geometrically
conceptDevelopment: Mini-lesson: tolerance and accuracy contexts; equivalent forms |x - a| = |a - x|
guidedPractice: Teacher-led practice writing absolute value expressions for real-world distance and accuracy situations
independentPractice: Practice problems writing absolute value expressions that model real-world situations
assessment: Exit ticket: write an absolute value expression for a real-world accuracy scenario
capReflection: Why does absolute value naturally model distance and accuracy rather than signed quantities?
